South Africa | Forbes Global Properties The Exclusive Real Estate Partner of Forbes Media
Launching · 1 July 2026

A Private Proposal

Strathmore Avenue · Camps Bay
In confidence.

An invitation to be part of the launch.

1 July 2026 · November 2026
Cape Town · South Africa
Hosted by
Keegan Steyn · South Africa | FGP
I · The Letter

A select group of homes. One story.

On the 1st of July 2026, we launch South Africa | Forbes Global Properties — the exclusive real estate partner of Forbes Media in South Africa.

Leading up to our physical launch event in November, we are curating a small, considered group of trophy homes from across the country to form the centrepiece of our press release and our introduction to the South African market.

We would like Strathmore Avenue to be one of them.

Keegan Steyn
CEO & Principal Broker · South Africa | Forbes Global Properties
II · The Launch

Forbes Global Properties. South Africa.

Forbes Global Properties is a curated international network of independent luxury brokerages, partnered exclusively with Forbes Media.

We open the South African office on 1 July 2026, with a physical launch event in November. Through the network, member firms across more than twenty countries are connected to qualified high-net-worth buyers and tenants worldwide.

A small number of South African homes will sit at the heart of that announcement.

III · The Feature

Your home, at the centre.

We would like to capture professional film and stills of the home, to be released as part of our launch on 1 July.

The content will appear in our marketing video, our press release, and our announcement to the South African and international media.

From there, the home will be listed on ForbesGlobalProperties.com, accessible to every member office in the network, and distributed across our social channels — introducing the property to a qualified, international audience.

IV · The Approach

Listed with discretion.

The home will be presented for both sale and rental, in keeping with our trophy-asset positioning. Sale: Price on Application. Rental: international tenants only.

We understand the primary intent is rental. That is where our energy will sit. Sale enquiries will be managed quietly, with expectations carefully shaped, and never at the expense of the rental conversation.

We will be precise in how the home is presented: the content tells the story, not the price.

The Timeline

From content capture to global release.

Phase One

Content Capture

Professional film and photography on site. May – June 2026.

Phase Two

Media Launch

Press release, marketing video, social distribution & ForbesGlobalProperties.com listing. 1 July 2026.

Phase Three

Global Network

Distribution to member firms across twenty-plus countries. Ongoing.

Phase Four

Physical Launch

South Africa | FGP launch event. November 2026.

In Closing

Quietly. Beautifully. Globally.

We would be honoured to include Strathmore Avenue in the launch of South Africa | Forbes Global Properties.

Keegan Steyn
CEO & Principal Broker · South Africa | Forbes Global Properties
